description:
Smart. Focused. Email.

Fast, cross-platform email designed to filter out the noise - so you can focus on what's important.
We are thrilled to introduce Smart Folders.
Smart Folders help keep important emails at your fingertips.
- Easy setup: Search for emails by sender, subject, or keyword, then save your search as a Smart Folder for instant access.
- Always organized: Quickly jump to emails that matter most, right from the sidebar. Easily track emails from clients, invoices, unread messages, attachments, and more.
- Flexible options: Create a Smart Folder from your search results, or via the sidebar: More > click the plus button under Smart Folders.
- A brand-new onboarding for Spark Teams, complete with videos and feature guides to help teams get started faster.
- Spark for Teams users can now use reactions in shared drafts and shared threads for quicker, more collaborative feedback.
- Added Clear and Collapse buttons for Recents in the sidebar.
As always, if you have questions or feedback, contact us at support@sparkmailapp.com.

P.S. If you encounter any issues with the automatic update, please use the following link to download the update manually:
https://downloads.sparkmailapp.com/Spark3/win/dist/3.25.0.114404/Spark.dmg
